# Sweep Migration Coverage

**Context:** logging-cleanup call-site-migration (2026-04-05). Task 2 (migrate createLogger call sites) missed 5 source files. Task 7 (update test files for new Logger interface) missed 2 test files. Both required manual fixup after the subagent reported DONE.

**Decision:** When writing sweep tasks (migrate all X / replace all Y), the Write Plan MUST include a pre-enumerated file list generated by grep before dispatch — not a description of the grep pattern for the agent to run. The task text should read: "These N files require modification: [explicit list]" not "Find and update all files that use X".

**Rationale:** Subagents run grep at dispatch time and miss files in unusual import paths, named differently from the dominant pattern, or in subdirectories not covered by their initial search scope. Pre-enumeration at Write Plan time puts the file list in the task text where it's inspectable, and the spec reviewer can verify the list is exhaustive against a second grep pass.

**Source:** .beastmode/artifacts/implement/2026-04-05-logging-cleanup-call-site-migration.md
